providers.description: Internet-wide host and DNS intelligence for exposed services.
providers.keyLocation: Account -> https://account.shodan.io -> Main API Key (top of page).

providers.description: Domain and URL reputation from aggregated scanners.
providers.keyLocation: Profile icon -> API Key -> copy from https://www.virustotal.com/gui/my-apikey
SecurityTrails -> Account -> API -> API Keys -> copy key.

providers.description: Certificate and host visibility search (Search API v2).
providers.keyLocation: Censys Search -> Account -> API -> API ID (paste here).

providers.description: Paired secret for Censys Search API v2.
providers.keyLocation: Same page as API ID -> copy Secret (second field).

providers.description: Historical URL scan metadata for your domain.
providers.keyLocation: urlscan.io -> Settings -> API Keys -> Create / copy key.

providers.description: IP abuse confidence for discovered addresses.
providers.keyLocation: AbuseIPDB -> Account -> Create Key (API v2) -> copy key.

providers.description: Internet background noise context for IPs.
providers.keyLocation: GreyNoise -> Account -> API Access -> copy API Key.

providers.description: Open threat exchange pulses linked to the domain.
providers.keyLocation: OTX -> Settings -> API Key (optional for light use).

providers.description: Public code search metadata (no secret validation).
providers.keyLocation: GitHub -> Settings -> Developer settings -> Personal access tokens -> Generate (read-only).

providers.description: Breach exposure API (domain search where licensed).
providers.keyLocation: haveibeenpwned.com -> API Key page after purchase -> copy key.
